headline: How Investors Are Reacting To D.R. Horton (DHI) Expanding Its Credit Facility To US$4 Billion
summary: In late March 2026, D.R. Horton and a syndicate of lenders led by Mizuho Bank amended the company’s long-standing credit agreement, increasing its aggregate revolving credit commitment to US$3.30 billion across staggered maturities through 2031 and lifting the overall facility limit to US$4.00 billion while updating interest margins and extension options. This expanded and extended credit capacity gives D.R. Horton additional financial flexibility, which could be important as builders...
